candidates.why: Separate operating D&A summary line at the same level as other operating expenses, but not labelled as COGS/cost of sales and therefore not clearly attributable to the selected COGS bucket 'Raw materials and Consumables'. Also preferable to any component rows if a bucket-specific D&A were needed.
Component of the separate 'Depreciation and impairment' summary row, not clearly labelled as COGS-related. Using it would risk misallocation and double counting versus the summary row.
Component of the separate D&A section, not labelled as relating to COGS/cost of sales.
Appears to be a sub-component under amortization, not a standalone COGS D&A row.
Appears to be a sub-component under amortization, not a standalone COGS D&A row.

variables.notes: The excerpt shows D&A as a separate operating line ('Depreciation and impairment') rather than a row specifically tied to COGS or nested under 'Raw materials and Consumables'. Because the task is to add only bucket-specific D&A to the selected COGS bucket, no COGS_DA row should be added separately.

variables.notes: No row in the operating excerpt explicitly identifies D&A as belonging to SG&A, admin, marketing, or R&D. The visible D&A is presented as a separate operating line outside the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS rows, but not clearly as an SG&A-specific bucket to be added to them. To avoid misallocation and double counting, no XSGA_DA row is selected.
